title: [FIRRTL][IMCP]  Should not be propagating invalid values through wires/regs/module ports

features.name: register with async reset assigned from invalid module output
features.description: Code should include a register with asynchronous reset that is assigned from an invalid module output port, where the invalid value propagates through the register to an output

features.name: invalid output port on sub-module
features.description: Code should include a submodule that has an output port which is invalid (no driver), causing invalid value propagation when instantiated

features.name: register chain with reset and invalid input propagation
features.description: Code should include a chain of register assignments where an invalid source value feeds through a register with reset, potentially causing incorrect invalid propagation
